notes: v2.1.0 continuity verification: workflow alignment, adapter sync, CI hardening. Some Windows-specific test failures expected (Unix-only APIs: os.statvfs, os.sysconf, os.getuid). Core functionality verified.

release_gate.notes: v2.1.0 test suite: 87.34% pass rate, 5656/6476 tests passed (excluding 75 skipped). 34 failures are platform-specific (Windows/Unix API differences).
